15c627e2: According to Kecare, it's quite simple. You only need to install the Kecare CLI to help you start a Kecare project from scratch. b8eb84bf: You can write your markdown articles in `.kecare/articls/`, and then use `kecare gen .` to generate the corresponding pages.
